## Validation

## Review notes

- [ ] I updated public documentation/examples for compatibility changes.
- [ ] I added public user-facing copy to the i18n catalog.
- [ ] I disclosed migrations, new environment variables, and dependencies.
- [ ] I considered authentication, redirects, private data, and trust
      boundaries.
- [ ] The diff excludes secrets, generated output, local databases, and
      unrelated changes.
